user_prompt: Draw parallelogram PQRS on a coordinate plane with P at (1,0), Q at (3,0), R at (4,2), S at (2,2). First rotate PQRS 90 degrees counterclockwise about the origin to get P'Q'R'S'. Then reflect P'Q'R'S' across the x-axis to get P''Q''R''S''. Label all twelve vertices and mark the origin O. I want to see the whole composition laid out step by step.
